# llms.txt
Site: Sanatan Gyan Sagar
Base URL: https://sanatan-gyan-sagar.pages.dev
Primary language: Hindi, Sanskrit, English
Purpose: Spiritual and educational reference content only.

Key sections:
- https://sanatan-gyan-sagar.pages.dev/bhajans.html
- https://sanatan-gyan-sagar.pages.dev/bhagavad-gita.html
- https://sanatan-gyan-sagar.pages.dev/shlokas.html
- https://sanatan-gyan-sagar.pages.dev/prayers.html
- https://sanatan-gyan-sagar.pages.dev/upanishads.html
- https://sanatan-gyan-sagar.pages.dev/wisdom.html

Policy notes:
- No medical, legal, or financial guarantees.
- Content is devotional and educational.
- Refer to https://sanatan-gyan-sagar.pages.dev/disclaimer.html and https://sanatan-gyan-sagar.pages.dev/privacy-policy.html
